readiness.shortage_details: All 10 arban units are unable to proceed due to persistent unavailability of web_search and web_fetch tools. This is a system-wide tool blockage.

updates.contingency: Given the persistent and system-wide unavailability of web_search and web_fetch tools, a contingency plan at the arban level is not feasible. Escalation to a higher system administrator or technical support is required to restore web tool functionality. Without these tools, no research can be conducted. Alternative: If internal knowledge bases or pre-cached data are available, these could be utilized, but current task context only provides web tools.
